posts.author: Flaviomian (Flavio Mian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Team! Hello Community!

From time to time, I update my board with data from my clients. I use the import from CSV to board, update duplicates but eventually some itens aren’t read as duplicates and, therefore, are created as new items, so I need to manually merge them with another monday tool “Manage Duplicate”.

The thing is that the items and the selection button to merge duplicates aren’t well alligned as you can see on the print below.

Could be possible to fix it, pretty please?

As shown, the button is slightly unaligned. Every time, I need to check if the selection button is from the previous or the next item haha.

image642×596 38.2 KB
